repositories.name: mmals-ml-wiki
repositories.description: Interactive MMALS and machine-learning encyclopedia connecting concepts, geometry, experiments, evidence status, and stable article links.

repositories.name: mmals-research-observatory
repositories.description: Versioned MMALS research observatory for scientific watch, claim review, experiment planning, evidence tracking, and Diderot publication.

repositories.name: mmals-symplectic-dynamics
repositories.description: A rigorous MMALS foundation for symplectic transport, port-Hamiltonian dissipation, Fisher--Rao learning, goal-conditioned control, and auditable adaptive memory.

repositories.name: mmals-activity-replay
repositories.description: Interactive replay and scientific-audit tool for MMALS routing, specialization, drift, regime changes, mutualistic gain, and cost signals.

repositories.name: mmals-ecospec
repositories.description: Systemic MMALS EcoSpec: axioms, mathematical model, TPUT loop, goal-conditioned routing, dual memory, RC2O/RL bridges, audit traces, and reference implementation.

repositories.name: mmals-cal
repositories.description: Reproducible evidence-verification framework for context-aware continual learning, combining regime-aware conformal calibration, no-leakage replay, uncertainty-set compactness, and ACTION/NO-DECISION auditing across seven MMALS benchmarks.

repositories.name: mmals-cal-evidence-contract
repositories.description: Versioned CSV/JSONL evidence contract, ZIP delivery profiles, schemas, adapters, and validation tooling for reproducible offline and regime-aware MMALS-CAL evaluation.

repositories.name: mmals-science-magazine
repositories.description: An illustrated science magazine tracing MMALS from tree hosts and fungal mediation to functional memory, RC2O, Geometry-MMALS, TPUT, and governed adaptive control.

repositories.name: bayesian-economic-quality-governance
repositories.description: A PyMC-ready research package for joint risk-and-margin release governance, safe-zone detection, and evidence-driven system transformation under uncertainty.

repositories.name: quality-intelligence-systems-governance
repositories.description: A systems-engineering whitepaper defining Quality Intelligence as an auditable architecture connecting hypotheses, evidence, Bayesian confidence, risk, economics, legal obligations, and executive decisions.

repositories.name: lac-digital-identity-opportunity-framework
repositories.description: ArXiv-style paper and reproducible dataset mapping digital identity maturity, citizen-service gaps, idLAC interoperability, and full-stack opportunities across 33 LAC countries.

repositories.name: fingerprint-feature-extraction-lab
repositories.description: Classical computer-vision pipeline for fingerprint skeletonization, minutiae and branch extraction, and experimental core/delta detection, with a reconstructed notebook, technical report, tests, and reproducible results.

repositories.name: synthetic-data-scaling-mmals
repositories.description: Multilevel analysis of synthetic-data scaling and model collapse, inspired by Julia Kempe’s lecture, with reproducible experiments and research directions for MMALS, STRAT-Q, probabilistic MTP, and Test Data Governance.

repositories.name: geometry-mmalls-g1
repositories.description: Grounded functional geometry for MMALS continual learning: context manifolds, route-simplex dynamics, causal host specialization, and functional memory transport.

repositories.name: mmals-stable-plastic-context-memory
repositories.description: Dataset-agnostic and backward-compatible stable-plastic context memory for MMALS, with legacy reproduction, adaptive fusion, deployed-posterior distillation, cross-dataset regression gates, and reviewer-facing ablations.

repositories.name: mmals-tput
repositories.description: Research specification and reference implementation of MMALS-TPUT, unifying latent geometry, energy-guided routing, dual memory, goal-conditioned control, RC2O-to-RL extensions, and Geometry-G1 validation.

repositories.name: mmals-v1.1-continual-learning-evidence
repositories.description: Full MMALS v1.1 research status, consolidating MNIST-family foundations, SplitCIFAR10 robust qualification, SplitCIFAR100 and CORe50 diagnostics, and the CORe50 v2.3 rescue ablation.

repositories.name: mmals-goal-adaptive-control
repositories.description: Goal-adaptive Geo/RL/Forward-Backward control layer for MMALS, extending RC2O routing with objective-conditioned route selection under accuracy, retention, cost, drift, and specialization trade-offs.

repositories.name: mmals-rc2o-splitcifar10-continual-learning
repositories.description: External continual-learning bridge experiments for MMALS/RC2O, starting with robust SplitCIFAR10 evidence over frozen A1 visual features and audited policy selection.

repositories.name: mmals-rc2o-prep-selector-regret-regime-audit
repositories.description: MMALS RC2O-prep audit: selector regret, feature-only regime estimation, and regime-certified safe deployment for auditable continual learning.

repositories.name: confidence-constrained-engineering-economics
repositories.description: A Bayesian engineering economics framework for deciding architecture, deployment, security, sovereignty, staging, and AI inference trade-offs under confidence constraints.  Alternative shorter description:

repositories.name: mmals
repositories.description: Mycelium-inspired continual learning research prototype for auditable inferred-context routing, functional memory, no-leakage policy selection, and comparative benchmark evaluation across MNIST-family tasks.

repositories.name: from-hyperautomation-to-systemic-engineering-capability
repositories.description: Reflective systems-engineering memo on hyperautomation, AI, sociotechnical systems, organizational learning, systemic capability, and the future of work.

repositories.name: stratq-ai
repositories.description: Evidence-centric, observability-driven AI-assisted testing framework for complex identity, biometric, and mission-critical systems.

repositories.name: airport-travel-border-identity-architecture
repositories.description: Strategic and technical architecture analysis of the airport, airline, border-control and digital identity ecosystem, covering passenger experience, airport operations, airline readiness, biometric trust, API/PNR risk assessment, and sovereign/hybrid deployment models.
